model_component.aerosol: varies with physics-version (p==1 none, p==3 OMA, p==4 TOMAS, p==5 MATRIX)
model_component.atmos: GISS-E2.1 (2 x 2.5 degrees; 144 x 90 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top level 0.1 hPa)
model_component.atmosChem: varies with physics-version (p==1 Non-interactive, p>1 GPUCCINI)
model_component.ocean: GISS Ocean (1 deg; 360 x 180 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top grid cell 0-10m)
model_component.ocnBgchem: NOBM v2 (NASA Ocean Biogeochemistry Model; same grid as ocean)
